## Overskrift

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

url = 'https://zenodo.org/record/6199560/files/default.csv'
data = pd.read_csv(url)

#plt.scatter(data['balance'], data['default'])

df_yes = data[data['default'] == "Yes"]
df_no = data[data['default'] == "No"]

x = np.linspace(0, 3000, 100)

hist_yes, edges_yes = np.histogram(df_yes["balance"], bins=x)
hist_no, edges_no = np.histogram(df_no["balance"], bins=x)

midpoints = edges_yes[:-1] + np.diff(edges_yes) / 2 

plt.plot(midpoints, hist_yes, label="Mislighold")
plt.plot(midpoints, hist_no, label="Betaler")
plt.legend()
plt.xlabel("Balance")
plt.ylabel("Antall")

proportions = hist_yes/(hist_yes+hist_no)
plt.figure()
plt.plot(midpoints, proportions, label="Andel mislighold")

def sigmoid(x, beta_0, beta_1):
    return np.exp(beta_0+beta_1*x)/(1 + np.exp(beta_0 + beta_1*x))

x_test = np.linspace(0, 3000, 100)
y_test = sigmoid(x_test, -10, 0.0053)
plt.plot(x_test, y_test, label="Modell")
plt.legend()
```
